resources.string: The plasma matrix brightens while the blast doors lock in sequence
PLASMA MATRIX WAKES UNDER RED WARNING LIGHTS

A subsonic note thrummed through the deck before any attendant dared to touch the final rune. Red warning lamps pulsed like a buried heart, ozone gathered at the rails, and coolant thundered through pipes large enough to swallow men. The ancient mimetic mind did not start; it considered the petition. When the parameters pleased it, the engine granted motion, and every shaking hand in the chamber knew the mercy could be withdrawn.
ENGINE AWAKENING. BLAST DOORS LOCKED. OZONE DETECTED. COOLANT SURGED THROUGH THE PIPES. OPERATORS TREMBLED BEFORE THE ANCIENT MIMETIC MIND. MOTION WAS GRANTED, NOT COMMANDED.
